Caption: Nobody is coming to save you. Build yourself.
Discipline will take you where motivation can't.
Small progress every day creates big results.
Your future depends on what you do today.
Stay focused. Stay hungry. Stay humble.
The pain of regret hurts more than hard work.
Comfort is the enemy of growth.
Every expert was once a beginner.
Win in silence and let success make the noise.
